global_rules: Every indexable route needs at least 5 outgoing internal links except short tool utility pages, which need at least 3.
Every long-tail question must link to its parent project page in the first half of the page.
Every Approved Document long-tail page must link to the parent AD hub and to at least 2 relevant project pages.
Every project page must link to relevant Approved Document hubs and at least one tool and one download.
Every download page must link back to a project or evidence page, not only to the downloads hub.
UKPlanningGuide cross-links should only appear where planning permission/permitted development is genuinely part of the user's next question.
orphan_policy: Fail validation if a route has zero incoming links in internal_link_graph_v5.json unless intentionally noindex/draft.
